postToolUse.description: Log edit events and optionally run format in enforce mode.
postToolUse.bash:
mkdir -p .vstack/logs
input="$(cat)"
printf '%s\n' "$input" >> .vstack/logs/hook-post-edit.jsonl
mode="${VSTACK_HOOKS_MODE:-audit}"
if [ "$mode" != "enforce" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
if printf '%s' "$input" | grep -Eq '"toolName"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"(edit|create|write|replace)"'; then
  if [ -f Makefile ] && command -v make >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    make format >/dev/null 2>&1 || printf '%s\n' 'format-run-failed' >> .vstack/logs/hook-quality-alerts.log
  else
    printf '%s\n' 'format-skipped-missing-make-or-makefile' >> .vstack/logs/hook-quality-alerts.log
  fi
fi
